evals.prompt: I just fixed a scroll bug on the feature branch feat/fix-scroll-gap. Can you deploy it to TestFlight so I can test on my iPhone?
evals.expected_output: Should deploy directly from the feature branch without requiring a merge. Should bump build number, archive, and export+upload with API key auth.

evals.prompt: I added a new /api/transcribe endpoint in the Next.js backend and the iOS TranscriptionService that calls it. The endpoint isn't deployed yet. Deploy to TestFlight so I can test voice input.
evals.expected_output: Should recognize the server dependency and advise merging/deploying the server changes first before deploying iOS to TestFlight. Should NOT just archive and upload from the branch.

evals.prompt: How do I set up TestFlight deployment? I've never done it from the command line before and I keep having to use Xcode's GUI which is slow.
evals.expected_output: Should walk through API key setup (App Store Connect), ExportOptions.plist creation, and the full deploy workflow. Should explain why API key auth is better than GUI sessions.
